nyheter.title: Norden sammen om felles flylegeutdanning
nyheter.summary: Norge, Sverige, Finland og Danmark går sammen om å utvikle en felles utdanning for militære flyleger. I dag sendes kandidatene til USA, men nå ønsker de nordiske landene å bygge opp et eget kurs som er bedre tilpasset nordiske forhold – samtidig som samarbeidet med USA videreføres.

nyheter.title: Status: Søk utdanning i Forsvaret – for Norge
nyheter.summary: Forsvaret har en rekke spennende og attraktive utdanninger. Og du gjør en meningsfull jobb for Norge. Nå nærmer søknadsfristen 15. april seg.

nyheter.title: Funn fra pilotprosjekt om arbeidstid­planlegging og lengre planhorisont
nyheter.summary: Bedre arbeidstidsplanlegging og lengre planhorisont gir økt forutsigbarhet for forsvarsansatte.

nyheter.title: Evakueringen av ukrainske pasienter fortsetter
nyheter.summary: Evakueringen av ukrainske pasienter fra krigen i Ukraina forsetter etter at avtalen med SAS om bruk av et medisinsk evakueringsfly nå er forlenget. Evakueringen skjer i samarbeid med EU etter ønske fra de.

nyheter.title: Regjeringen vil styrke Forsvarsløftet med 115 milliarder kroner
nyheter.summary: Regjeringen vil øke de økonomiske rammene for langtidsplanen for forsvarssektoren med ytterligere 115 milliarder kroner frem til 2036.

nyheter.title: Status: Oppdatert langtidsplan – hva betyr det?
nyheter.summary: I dag la regjeringen frem sitt forslag til oppdatert langtidsplan. Forsvarssjef Eirik Kristoffersen forteller om planen og veien videre.

nyheter.title: Logistikkens livline under Cold Response 2026
nyheter.summary: KNM «Maud» er Nordens største og eneste militære tankskip. Under årets storøvelse fikk fartøyet vist hvorfor hun omtales som en av Forsvarets viktigste kapasiteter.

nyheter.title: Eksotisk jobbsjanse: – Jeg er heldig som får være her
nyheter.summary: Hva tenker du om nordlys og mørketid, ishav-stemning og sterkt samhold? Nå er verdens mest eksotiske jobb ledig. – Dette har gitt meg mer enn jeg hadde trodd var mulig, sier en som har hatt jobben før.

nyheter.title: Status: Forsvarets NATO-avdeling
nyheter.summary: Ved nyttår ble hele Forsvarets NATO-representasjon samlet under en ny avdeling, Forsvarets NATO-avdeling (FNA). Sjef FNA, generalløytnant Rolf Folland, forteller her om avdelingen.

nyheter.title: Tjenestegjort i Afghanistan? Bli med på markering
nyheter.summary: Lørdag 13. juni 2026 blir det storstilt markering på Akershus festning for norske Afghanistan-veteraner. Alle som har tjenestegjort i Afghanistan, er hjertelig velkomne til å delta.

nyheter.title: Russia’s massive Black Sea problem is worse than it looks
nyheter.summary:
On paper, the Russian Navy remains the dominant force in the Black Sea. But after ceding control to Ukraine’s uncrewed surface drones, it now faces a mounting crisis: its key base at Novorossiysk is increasingly untenable, unless Moscow is willing to absorb further warship losses. nyheter.summary:
Leidos Australia built one of two Sea Archer unmanned surface vessels (USV) that are in existence – the other was constructed in the USA – and the 11.2m-long craft is currently undergoing a series of Australian trials to demonstrate its maturity. nyheter.title: South Korean Submarine Completes First Leg of Indo-Pacific Voyage to Canada
nyheter.summary: A Republic of Korea Navy attack boat docked in Guam on Tuesday, completing the first leg of what will be the longest voyage of a South Korean submarine to date. ROKS Dosan Ahn Chang-ho (SS-083), the first of Seoul’s KSS-III-class of diesel electric submarines, departed South Korea last month for Canada ahead of drills with the Royal Canadian Navy in support of Seoul’s pitch to Ottawa’s 12 attack boat program. nyheter.summary:

nyheter.title: Pentagon’s Fiscal Year 2027 Budget Request for Procurement Programs
nyheter.summary: The following is the Pentagon’s Fiscal Year 2027 budget request for procurement programs, released April 3, 2026. Summary This document outlines the Fiscal Year 2027 budget request for the Defense Department’s procurement programs. The document includes total obligational authority across Army, Navy and Marine Corps, and Air Force and Space Force accounts on the procurement programs of missiles, aircraft, ships and support programs. Download the document here.

nyheter.title: New Navy Budget Wants $3B for New Tomahawks, $4.3B for SM-6s
nyheter.summary: The latest Pentagon budget request calls for massive purchase increases of two key missiles the Navy has relied on for the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran and the U.S. conflict with the Houthis in the Red Sea. Specifically, the new Fiscal Year 2027 budget is seeking a 1,200 percent increase in the number of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles and a 225 percent increase in Standard Missile 6s over what Congress appropriated money for in Fiscal Year 2026. nyheter.title: Marines Test Custom-built Drone in Live Fire Test, Strike Unmanned Surface Vessel
nyheter.summary: The Marine Corps carried out its first live-fire drone strike against a maritime surface vessel last month during a trial in Japan as part of the service’s effort to advance its autonomous capabilities. Marines from the III Expeditionary Operations Training Group (III EOTG) and operators from Naval Special Warfare conducted the maritime drone strike from a Naval Special Warfare surface craft, taking out an unmanned surface vessel designed and built by the Marine team. Sensor solutions provider HENSOLDT UK has secured two contracts with SRT Marine System Solutions Ltd (SRT), a UK-based civil-defence maritime surveillance systems company, to supply a total of 50 radar systems for deployment within integrated national coastal surveillance systems. rov_teknologi.title: French Navy Submarine Launches, Recovers U.S. Navy Drone in Test Run
rov_teknologi.summary: The French Navy tested launching and recovering a U.S. Navy Razorback Unmanned Undersea Vehicle (UUV) from a submerged French Suffren-class nuclear-powered attack submarine last month, validating the French submarine’s removable dry deck shelter can be used for underwater drone operations. A Suffren-class submarine deployed the Razorback, launching and recovering the drone with its dry deck shelter, from March 16-20 while operating off the coast of Toulon, France.
